data.name: buttonApply.ToolTip
data.value: Apply the strained crystal as the new structure and close this window.

data.name: numericBoxA.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice parameter a (in ångström) of the strained cell, computed from the strain tensor (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxAlpha.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice angle α between the b and c axes (in degrees) of the strained cell, computed from the strain tensor (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxB.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice parameter b (in ångström) of the strained cell, computed from the strain tensor (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxBeta.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice angle β between the c and a axes (in degrees) of the strained cell, computed from the strain tensor (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxC.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice parameter c (in ångström) of the strained cell, computed from the strain tensor (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxGamma.ToolTip
data.value: Lattice angle γ between the a and b axes (in degrees) of the strained cell, computed from the strain tensor (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxStrain11.ToolTip
data.value: Normal strain component ε11 along the a (x) direction (dimensionless fractional elongation); changing it updates the strained lattice parameters and stress.

data.name: numericBoxStrain12.ToolTip
numericBoxStrain13.ToolTip
numericBoxStrain22.ToolTip
data.value: Normal strain component ε22 along the b (y) direction (dimensionless fractional elongation); changing it updates the strained lattice parameters and stress.

data.name: numericBoxStrain23.ToolTip
numericBoxStrain33.ToolTip
data.value: Normal strain component ε33 along the c (z) direction (dimensionless fractional elongation); changing it updates the strained lattice parameters and stress.

data.name: numericBoxStress11.ToolTip
data.value: Normal stress component σ11 (in GPa) computed from the stiffness matrix times the strain (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxStress12.ToolTip
data.value: Shear stress component σ12 (in GPa) computed from the stiffness matrix times the strain (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxStress13.ToolTip
data.value: Shear stress component σ13 (in GPa) computed from the stiffness matrix times the strain (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxStress22.ToolTip
data.value: Normal stress component σ22 (in GPa) computed from the stiffness matrix times the strain (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxStress23.ToolTip
data.value: Shear stress component σ23 (in GPa) computed from the stiffness matrix times the strain (read-only).

data.name: numericBoxStress33.ToolTip
data.value: Normal stress component σ33 (in GPa) computed from the stiffness matrix times the strain (read-only).
